description_long: This is a classic wooden baseball bat with a natural wood grain finish, showing signs of use and wear along its length. The handle is wrapped with a black grip tape that features evenly spaced horizontal stripes, providing both visual contrast and improved grip. The barrel is smooth and tapers gradually from the thick hitting end to the thinner handle, with no visible logos or markings on the wood. The knob at the base of the handle is rounded and slightly flared, matching the wood tone of the rest of the bat. The bat's surface appears hard and slightly glossy, reflecting its lacquered finish. Overall, the object is well-crafted and functional, suitable for use in recreational or professional baseball settings.
description: A well-worn wooden baseball bat with a black striped grip tape and a smooth, lacquered finish. The bat features a natural wood grain and a rounded knob at the handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the wood grain, black grip tape, and the gradual taper from barrel to handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the barrel, emphasizing the circular cross-section and the black grip tape wrapping the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the wood texture and the full length of the bat with the grip tape visible.
description_view_3: End-on view of the handle, focusing on the rounded knob and the black grip tape pattern.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: Black grip tape with evenly spaced horizontal stripes, wrapped in a spiral pattern around the handle, providing a textured, grippy surface. No visible designs or logos.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is simply the rounded wooden knob at the base of the handle, matching the bat's wood color and texture, with no distinct markings or logos.
